name: Cheese Stuffed Breadsticks
recipeInstructions:
1. Separate the breadstick dough into four equal pieces.
2. Take one piece of dough and fold a small portion of one end over one end of a piece of string cheese.
3. Wind the dough around the cheese, continuing until about halfway around.
4. Use a second piece of dough to overlap slightly over the first piece, continue winding the dough around the cheese to the end.
5. Fold the last section of dough over itself and pinch the seams along the length of the breadstick to seal in the cheese.
6. Repeat steps 1-5 for the remaining three pieces of string cheese.
7. Bake according to the package instructions for breadsticks.
8. Wrap the baked breadsticks in foil and freeze.
To serve: Place frozen breadsticks in a lunchbox; they will thaw by lunchtime. Alternatively, remove the foil and microwave until warmed through. Serves 4.
Note: This recipe can be made more economical by using homemade bread dough and cutting a block of mozzarella into sticks. Prepare and freeze in bulk for easy lunches.
